title: Annual Tech Fest — BYTE 2026
description: BIT Durg's flagship annual tech fest featuring hackathons, coding contests, robotics, paper presentations, and project expos. Open to all engineering students.
registration: Open till 10 March at the Student Affairs office or online portal

title: Cultural Fest — RANG 2026
description: Annual cultural festival with music, dance, drama, fashion show, and various art competitions.
registration: Contact Student Affairs office or your class representative

title: Guest Lecture — AI & Future of Work
speaker: Mr. Rahul Kapoor, Senior Engineer, Google India
description: A talk on Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and how they are reshaping the future of the IT industry.
eligibility: CSE, IT, MCA students (other branches welcome)

title: Sports Day 2026
description: Annual sports day with competitions in cricket, basketball, athletics, badminton, and volleyball.
registration: Register at the Sports office by 5 March

title: Workshop — Full Stack Web Development
description: 2-day hands-on workshop on React, Node.js, and MongoDB. Certificates will be provided.
eligibility: CSE, IT, MCA (2nd year and above)

title: Entrepreneurship Conclave
description: Panel discussion with successful entrepreneurs and startup founders. Learn about startup culture, funding, and idea validation.
eligibility: MBA, MCA, and final year students of all branches
registration: Free — register at the MBA Department office
